T001.description: Record current CI job duration baseline on postgres:16-alpine before changing the image tag
T001.result_summary: Baseline: last 5 main CI runs on postgres:16-alpine took 47-53s (avg ~51s)

T002.description: Update .github/workflows/ci.yml service container image from postgres:16-alpine to postgres:18-alpine

T003.description: Trigger CI run and confirm npx prisma migrate deploy succeeds with no errors against PostgreSQL 18
T003.result_summary: Verified locally: prisma migrate deploy applies 20260703182806_init cleanly on postgres:18-alpine (v18.4)

T004.description: Confirm full Jest test suite passes in the PostgreSQL 18 CI run
T004.result_summary: Verified locally: 20/20 test suites, 36/36 tests pass against postgres:18-alpine in 6.25s

T005.description: Compare CI job duration on PostgreSQL 18 vs the T001 baseline against the 10% regression budget
T005.result_summary: CI run 28704989213 on postgres:18-alpine: 49s total, prisma migrate deploy + full suite all green. Within 47-53s baseline, no regression.

T006.result_summary: quickstart.md line 5: 'a PostgreSQL instance' -> 'a PostgreSQL 18 instance'

T007.description: Update README.md setup instructions to reference PostgreSQL 18 wherever a version is named
T007.result_summary: README.md line 23: 'a running PostgreSQL instance' -> 'a running PostgreSQL 18 instance'

T008.description: Verify .env.example requires no version-specific change and record the finding
T008.result_summary: Confirmed .env.example has no version-specific string; no change needed

T009.description: Check Prisma official supported-databases docs/changelog for PostgreSQL 18 status and record finding
T009.result_summary: Prisma docs now officially list PostgreSQL 18 as supported (supported-databases reference page); confirmed empirically via T003/T004 with prisma 5.22.0

T010.description: If CI reveals a Prisma-specific PostgreSQL 18 failure, upgrade prisma and @prisma/client to a confirmed-compatible version and re-verify
T010.result_summary: Not applicable: T003/T004/T009 show no Prisma-PG18 incompatibility. Kept prisma/@prisma/client pinned at ^5.22.0, no upgrade needed

T011.result_summary: Ran quickstart.md steps end-to-end: postgres:18-alpine container + prisma migrate deploy + npm test all passed; doc grep confirms all version-bearing mentions now say PostgreSQL 18

T012.description: Final PR review and merge of the PostgreSQL 18 upgrade
T012.result_summary: Committed and pushed directly to main (6fff546) per user decision; CI green on postgres:18-alpine
